body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/37658579?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/nikkoenggaliano", "id": 37658579, "login": "nikkoenggaliano", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM3NjU4NTc5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/nikkoenggaliano", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53531", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}], "description": "### Summary RaTeX’s recursive-descent parser recurses one (or more) native stack frame per nesting level at `{`, `\left`, `\sqrt{`, `^{`, etc, with **no maximum depth limit**. A short, ~10 KB input of nested groups overflows the 8 MB main-thread stack and aborts the process. With `panic = "abort"` (`Cargo.toml:48`), and because a Rust stack overflow is always a fatal `SIGABRT` regardless of panic strategy this is an unrecoverable, whole-process denial of service reachable from a single untrusted LaTeX string. ### Details The mutual recursion has no depth guard (`crates/ratex-parser/src/parser.rs`): ``` parse_expression (:113) -> parse_atom (:281/285) -> parse_group (:451) ^ | | on '{' (:459) recurse | +--------------------------+ ``` `\left` adds another recursive edge: `handle_left` → `parse_expression` (`crates/ratex-parser/src/functions/left_right.rs:47`). The only counters present are unrelated to depth: `leftright_depth` (a `\right`-matching counter, `parser.rs:24`) and the macro expander’s `max_expand = 1000` (`macro_expander.rs:64`), which does **not** gate brace / `\left` recursion (those tokens never pass through `expand_once`). There is no `recursion_limit`/depth parameter on `parse_group`, `parse_expression`, or `parse_atom`. ### PoC ``` $ python3 -c 'import sys;sys.stdout.write("{"*200000+"x"+"}"*200000)' | ./target/release/parse thread 'main' has overflowed its stack fatal runtime error: stack overflow, aborting Aborted (core dumped) # exit 134 ``` (Other nesting forms work equally, e.g. `\left(`×N, `\sqrt{`×N, `^{`×N.) ### Impact A single small request crashes the whole RaTeX process. In a typical server-side math-rendering service this is a reliable, unauthenticated DoS; on smaller worker-thread stacks (e.g. a 512 KB async runtime thread) only a few hundred bytes of nesting are required.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T23:39:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53531"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-07T23:39:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/erweixin/RaTeX/security/advisories/GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/erweixin/RaTeX/security-advisories/GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/erweixin/RaTeX", "summary": "ratex-parser has unbounded parser recursion that leads to stack overflow (process abort)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T23:39:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4w5h-hx6r-28q7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "ratex-parser"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.1.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: ratex-parser has unbounded parser recursion that leads to stack overflow (process abort)
